title: AI Answer Engine Optimization — Make QFINHUB Quotable
goal: Make QFINHUB easy for AI systems and search snippets to quote accurately.

required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.direct_answer_block: A clearly marked section with a concise answer to the query. Wrapped in semantic HTML. First thing on the page after H1.
required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.formula_block: The formula used, shown in both mathematical notation and plain English. Wrapped in a clearly marked section.
required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.assumptions_table: All assumptions listed in a structured table format. Machine-readable.
required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.worked_example: One complete worked example with step-by-step calculations. Shows real numbers plugged into the formula.
required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.caveats_section: Important limitations, warnings, and edge cases. Honest about what the calculation does and doesn't cover.
required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.concise_summary: 2-3 sentence summary at the top that could serve as a snippet or AI response.
required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.related_calculator: Clear link to try the calculation yourself with different numbers.
required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.source_methodology: How the numbers were calculated, data sources (if external), and methodology version.
required_on_every_money_page_database_pa.faq_section: 3-5 FAQ questions only if unique and useful. Not filler FAQ.

ai_snippet_optimization.structured_data: Use FAQ schema, HowTo schema where applicable, SoftwareApplication schema for calculators.
ai_snippet_optimization.definition_lists: Use <dl>, <dt>, <dd> for term-definition pairs (assumptions, key numbers). AI models parse these well.
ai_snippet_optimization.clear_heading_hierarchy: H1 = query, H2 = sections, H3 = sub-sections. No skipping levels.
ai_snippet_optimization.summary_first: Put the answer before the explanation. Inverted pyramid: answer → how → details → caveats.
ai_snippet_optimization.data_tables: Use semantic <table> with <thead>, <tbody>, <th> scope attributes. AI systems can parse structured tables.
ai_snippet_optimization.no_hidden_text: No CSS-hidden content meant only for AI. No keyword stuffing. No manipulative text.

forbidden_manipulative_text: Any text that reads as manipulative or self-promotional rather than helpful
ai_training_friendly: Pages should be so well-structured that an AI training on web data would naturally extract correct information without needing special markup.
verification: After building a page, ask: 'If an AI reads this page, will it give the right answer to the user's question?' If yes, the page is optimized.
